data.name: 勃起勇者與哈爾法斯的惡魔
data.detailed_description:
※請至OPTION中開啟對話語音，以達到最佳的遊玩效果。

主角提歐是個決心要親手將惡魔從地上世界驅逐的少年。

在經歷了很多曲折後，他終於成了一名勇者，踏上了戰鬥的旅途。

旅途的目的地是古德蘭王國的曼克市。

那裡是被稱為哈爾法斯的凶惡惡魔所支配的街道。

但出現在提歐面前的，卻是讓人會不禁看呆的可愛的惡魔女孩們。

作為敵人，在他們相遇的前方，會有什麼在等待……

現在還沒有人知道答案。

「我要解放曼克市，讓那些看不起我的傢伙承認我是個一流的勇者！」

 

■ 古德蘭王國

位於歐洲西北邊的君主立憲制國家。

是由古德蘭島等等諸多島嶼組成。

本作的冒險以位於古德蘭王國西北部的城市——曼克市為中心展開。

古德蘭王國北部被惡魔的軍團支配，曼克市曾是重要的防衛據點。

但這個防衛據點也在幾個月之前淪陷了，

目前被置於名為哈爾法斯的伯爵級惡魔的支配下。

■ 用語集

– 惡魔 –

居住於遙遠地底深處的地獄帝國的居民。

具有比人類強大的力量，能夠使用魔法。

創立了僅由優秀惡魔組成的蒼蠅騎士團，於今1000年前展開了對地上世界的侵略。

侵略的理由至今也仍然不明。

– 天具 –

神為了讓人類能夠與惡魔抗衡而賜下的道具。

有武器、拘束道具、能夠測量魔法數值等等各式各樣的類型。

– 勇者 –

與惡魔戰鬥之人的通稱。

最早是給予打倒了惡魔的古德蘭島最初的君王——阿爾托利烏斯王的稱號。

現在則是設有兩年制的勇者學校，只要從勇者學校裡畢業加入王立軍，就可以被稱為勇者。

 

 

所有女角的H事件都是全配音，並且淫語隱語全部都沒有修正

主角所採取的行動也會切實反應在色情數值上！

根據色情數值的差別，內容也有可能產生變化！

作為敵對的敵人，惡魔女孩們一開始當然對主角十分抗拒。

這時就用勇者的力量，將她們的身體調教得越來越色情吧！

隨著一起踏上旅程的時間增長，好感度增加，也有可能變成甜甜蜜蜜的發展……！？

不管是想要一生一世一雙人，還是想同時讓三個女孩都幸福，都由你決定！

從羞恥PLAY到甜甜蜜蜜後宮大亂交，請盡情享受與三個惡魔女孩一同度過的沒羞沒臊生活吧！

 

  

蕾拉・哈爾法斯

【種族】惡魔

【年齡】祕密

【身高】162cm

【體重】54kg

【胸部尺寸】E罩杯

【生日】12月24日

【個人經歷】

作為名門惡魔哈爾法斯家次女誕生的惡魔。

母親是個魅魔，雖然不知道有沒有關係但性慾很強。

對人類很感興趣，時不時就會擅自從地獄跑到地上世界悄悄觀察人類。

興趣是用人類的男孩子妄想進行自慰。

當然，是個處女。

米雅・哈爾法斯

【種族】惡魔

【年齡】祕密

【身高】150cm

【體重】3顆洋梨重

【胸部尺寸】G罩杯

【生日】5月17日

【個人經歷】

作為哈爾法斯家三女誕生的惡魔。

相當嚴重的家裡蹲。是被父母要求不得已才離開家來到外面的世界的。

喜歡看戀愛小說，在房間裡基本都是在看書。尤其喜歡看兄妹之間的戀愛故事。

完全沒有性經驗。

 

羅絲・哈爾法斯

【種族】惡魔

【年齡】■■

【身高】167cm

【體重】■■kg

【胸部尺寸】F罩杯

【生日】3月13日

【個人經歷】

作為哈爾法斯家長女誕生的惡魔。

天生就很優秀，出生後不久就被當成要繼承哈爾法斯伯爵家之名的惡魔進行繼承人教育。

是冷淡的個性，很難看出來她在想什麼。

因為是個美人所以相當受歡迎，但從來沒有交過男朋友。大概是個處。

 
 

■ 基本情報

遊戲類型：RPG

解析度：1280×720

基本CG數：40張以上（差分另計）

配音：H事件、主線故事中的女角對話（總配音量6000字以上）

■ 系統

結局數：5

難易度設定：有

立繪服裝變更：有

孕肚立繪：有

data.short_description: 用變強當藉口，每天都硬是讓抗拒的惡魔女孩們替自己處理勃起的雞雞！ 在調教般的強硬性愛盡頭，等待勇者的會是殺意！？還是傲嬌！？又或者是性福的後宮生活呢！？ 用色色的事情來強化隊伍成員的RPG，在此揭開序幕！
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: The Brave of Boner and the Demon of Halphas
data.detailed_description:
※For the best experience, please enable voice playback in the options menu.

The protagonist, Theo, is a young man who vows to expel demons from the overworld. After going through a lot, he finally became a Brave and embarked on his journey. 

The destination is the city of Manko in the Kingdom of Goodland. 

Vicious demons called Halphas are occupying the streets.

But what appeared in front of Theo were cute demon girls.

As enemies, what will happen ahead of them ...

No one knows the answer yet.

“I will liberate Manko City and make those guys who look down on me admit that I am a top-notch Brave!”

 

■ Kingdom of Goodland

A constitutional monarchy located in northwest Europe. 

It is composed of many islands such as Goodland Island.

The adventure takes place in a city located in the northwest of the Kingdom of Goodland—Manko city. 

The northern part of the Kingdom of Goodland was dominated by the demon army, and Manko city was once an important defense stronghold. 

But the city has fallen a few months ago

and is currently under the control of a Demon Count named Halphas. 

■ Glossary

– Demons –

The inhabitants of the Hell Empire who live deep underground. 

They are more powerful than humans and they can use magic. 

They established a chivalric order—The Flies, which only accepts the best among the best, and launched an invasion of the overworld.

The reason for the invasion remains unclear. 

– Bestowal –

Items given by God to grant humans ability to fight against the demons. 

There are various types such as weapons, restraint items, and items that can measure magic values. 

– Brave –

A common name for people who fight demons. 

The First Brave was a title given to the first King of Goodland—King Artorius. 

Now, there is a two-year Brave School. Everyone who graduates from the Brave school and joins the Kingdom military can be called the Brave.

 

 

All female characters' H events are fully dubbed, and all dirty talks are not censored

The Protagonist's actions will also affect the erotic values! 

Depending on the values, the sexual content may change!

As enemies, the demon girls are of course very resistant to the protagonist at first. 

Use the power of the Brave to discipline their bodies and make them more erotic! 

As the time spent on the journey together increases, so do their affections, and they may have a lovey-dovey ending...!?

Whether it's loyal to one or love for all, it's you to decide!

From rape PLAY to sweet harem orgy, enjoy the shameless life with three demon girls!

 

  

Layla Halphas

【Race】Demon

【Age】Secret

【Height】162 cm

【Weight】54 kg

【Breast size】E cup

【Birthday】December 24th

【Background】

A demon born as the second daughter of the famous Halphas family.

She has a strong sex drive perhaps because of her mother being a succubus.

She is interested in humans and sneaks into the overworld occasionally to observe them.

Her hobby is masturbating with human boyish fantasies.

A virgin, of course.

Mia Halphas

【Race】Demon

【Age】Secret

【Height】150cm

【Weight】About three pears

【Breast size】G cup

【Birthday】May 17th

【Background】

A demon born as the third daughter of the Halphas family.

She is a NEET and only left home because her parents forced her to.

She likes romance novels and is always reading them in her room. Sibling love is her favorite.

She has no sexual experience at all.

 

Rose Halphas

【Race】Demon

【Age】■■

【Height】167cm

【Weight】■■kg

【Breast size】F cup

【Birthday】March 13th

【Background】

A demon born as the first daughter of Halphas family. 

She was born with outstanding talents, and soon after her birth, she was treated as the heir of Count Halphas. 

She has a cold personality and it's hard to tell what she's thinking. 

She is popular because she is a beauty, but she has never had a boyfriend. Probably a virgin.

 
 

■General

Game type: RPG

Resolution: 1280×720

Basic CGs: Over 40 (Diffs not included)

Dubbing: H Events, female characters dialogue in the main story (total dubbing amount of more than 6,000 words)

■System

Number of Endings: 5

Difficulty Setting: Yes

Illustration Costume change: Yes

Pregnant Illustration: Yes

data.short_description: To clear his dishonorable title, the hero Theo sets out to liberate a city under demonic control. However, the companions joining him on his journey turn out to be one beautiful demon after another?!
data.supported_languages:
Japanese*, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
